claim: The denominator-cleared zero-pair propagator charge kernel is invariant under the surviving label-preserving symmetry because that symmetry is trivial. It is compatible with the finite Ward/flux-balance ledger as a packet-source kernel: the individual plus/minus sector-26 images are not closed-return Ward characters, but the paired residue is sector-26 neutral and does not disturb the rank-zero public flux balance.

definition.packet_source_ward_compatibility: A packet-source kernel is compatible when it is fixed by surviving labels, has no public closed-return flux contradiction, and its paired plus/minus cleared residue is neutral in the sector-26 ledger.
definition.surviving_label_preserving_symmetry: The full-exposure radical-gate lift after imposing the certified charge-frame, sector-26, and fine spectral labels.
definition.ward_native_closed_return_character: The all-mask corrected R33 character with image {0,13} in Z/26.

kernel_summary.kernel_status: A finite propagator charge kernel exists after canonical denominator clearing. The raw pole residues live over Q because they contain 1/2 coefficients; the sector-26 ledger becomes integral only for the cleared plus/minus residue classes [1,1] and [1,-1].

symmetry_summary.kernel_fixed_reason: The full label-preserving symmetry is already reduced to the identity, so the denominator-cleared propagator charge kernel is fixed without quotienting.

ward_flux_summary.compatibility_status: Compatible as a denominator-cleared packet-source kernel: the individual plus/minus sector-26 residues are not closed-return Ward characters, while the paired source/dipole class is sector-26 neutral and the public closed-return flux rank remains zero.

interpretation.what_this_does_not_prove: This does not yet build a sourced Ward identity. A stronger theorem needs a coupling map from packet-source residues into closed-return masks or a new sourced finite Ward law.
what_this_proves: the denominator-cleared kernel is fixed by the full surviving label-preserving symmetry
that invariance is identity-level, not protection by a nontrivial residual group
the individual plus/minus sector-26 residues are not native all-mask Ward characters
the paired cleared residue is sector-26 neutral and public-flux compatible

next_highest_yield_item: Construct the source-to-closed-return coupling map, or prove no such map exists, from the denominator-cleared propagator kernel into the all-mask Ward residue group.
